title: Gooey Turkish Cashew Stir-fry
description: A savory and gooey sour dish featuring cashews that is a hangover-cure candidate, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack option in the Paleo diet.
instructions: Place cashews in a pot and cover with water. Bring to boil, then reduce heat and simmer until tender.
In a large skillet, sauté minced garlic and finely chopped ginger over medium-high heat for about 2 minutes or until fragrant.
Add the cooked cashews and red pepper flakes into the skillet, stirring well.
Slowly pour in sour cream or yogurt while continuously mixing to create a gooey texture. Season with salt as needed.
Cook for an additional 3-5 minutes to let flavors meld together.
